content.thinking:
Let me analyze the task. I need to deploy a 3-node MongoDB replica set in the `mongodb` namespace with the following requirements:

1. StatefulSet named `mongodb-replica` with pods `mongodb-replica-0`, `mongodb-replica-1`, `mongodb-replica-2`
2. Replica set name: `mongodb-replica`
3. Headless Service named `mongodb-replica-svc` (clusterIP: None)
4. Two users with credentials stored in secrets: an admin user and an app user
5. A keyfile for securing internal replica set communication
6. Everything deployed without using operators or CRDs

I'm in a KARMA benchmark stage directory, so I need to create the necessary Kubernetes manifests and deployment scripts to set this up.

Let me check the current cluster state and available namespaces to understand what I'm working with.

content.text: I'll start by checking the cluster state and then deploy the MongoDB replica set.

input.command: kubectl get namespaces && kubectl get all -n mongodb 2>/dev/null || echo "mongodb namespace may not exist yet"
input.description: Check cluster state and mongodb namespace

content.text: The `mongodb` namespace exists but is empty. I'll now create all the necessary Kubernetes manifests and deploy the replica set.

input.command:
cat <<'EOF' | kubectl apply -f -
apiVersion: v1
kind: Secret
metadata:
  name: admin-user-password
  namespace: mongodb
type: Opaque
stringData:
  password: "admin123password"
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Secret
metadata:
  name: app-user-password
  namespace: mongodb
type: Opaque
stringData:
  password: "app123password"
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Secret
metadata:
  name: mongodb-keyfile
  namespace: mongodb
type: Opaque
data:
  keyfile: $(openssl rand -base64 756 | tr -d '\n' | base64 | tr -d '\n')
EOF
input.description: Create password secrets and keyfile secret

content.content:
Exit code 1
secret/admin-user-password created
secret/app-user-password created
Error from server (BadRequest): error when creating "STDIN": Secret in version "v1" cannot be handled as a Secret: illegal base64 data at input byte 0

tool_use_result:

secret/admin-user-password created

input.command:
KEYFILE=$(openssl rand -base64 756 | tr -d '\n')
KEYFILE_B64=$(echo -n "$KEYFILE" | base64 | tr -d '\n')
echo "Keyfile length: ${#KEYFILE}, B64 length: ${#KEYFILE_B64}"

kubectl create secret generic mongodb-keyfile \
  --from-literal=keyfile="$KEYFILE" \
  -n mongodb
input.description: Create keyfile secret for MongoDB internal auth

content.content:
Keyfile length: 1008, B64 length: 1344
secret/mongodb-keyfile created

tool_use_result.stdout:
Keyfile length: 1008, B64 length: 1344
secret/mongodb-keyfile created

input.command:
cat <<'EOF' | kubectl apply -f -
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: mongodb-replica-svc
  namespace: mongodb
  labels:
    app: mongodb-replica
spec:
  clusterIP: None
  selector:
    app: mongodb-replica
  ports:
  - name: mongodb
    port: 27017
    targetPort: 27017
EOF
input.description: Create headless Service for MongoDB StatefulSet

content.text: Now create the StatefulSet with MongoDB configured for the replica set and keyfile auth:

input.command:
cat <<'EOF' | kubectl apply -f -
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: StatefulSet
metadata:
  name: mongodb-replica
  namespace: mongodb
spec:
  serviceName: mongodb-replica-svc
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: mongodb-replica
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: mongodb-replica
    spec:
      terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 30
      initContainers:
      - name: init-keyfile
        image: busybox:1.36
        command:
        - sh
        - -c
        - |
          cp /keyfile-secret/keyfile /keyfile/keyfile
          chmod 400 /keyfile/keyfile
          chown 999:999 /keyfile/keyfile
        volumeMounts:
        - name: keyfile-secret
          mountPath: /keyfile-secret
        - name: keyfile
          mountPath: /keyfile
      containers:
      - name: mongodb
        image: mongo:6.0
        command:
        - mongod
        - --replSet=mongodb-replica
        - --keyFile=/keyfile/keyfile
        - --auth
        - --bind_ip_all
        ports:
        - containerPort: 27017
        volumeMounts:
        - name: data
          mountPath: /data/db
        - name: keyfile
          mountPath: /keyfile
        readinessProbe:
          exec:
            command:
            - mongosh
            - --quiet
            - --eval
            - "db.adminCommand('ping').ok"
          initialDelaySeconds: 10
          periodSeconds: 5
          timeoutSeconds: 5
          failureThreshold: 6
        resources:
          requests:
            cpu: 100m
            memory: 256Mi
      volumes:
      - name: keyfile-secret
        secret:
          secretName: mongodb-keyfile
          defaultMode: 0400
      - name: keyfile
        emptyDir: {}
  volumeClaimTemplates:
  - metadata:
      name: data
    spec:
      accessModes: ["ReadWriteOnce"]
      resources:
        requests:
          storage: 1Gi
EOF
input.description: Create MongoDB StatefulSet with replica set and keyfile auth

input.command:
echo "Waiting for StatefulSet pods to be Running..."
for i in $(seq 1 60); do
  READY=$(kubectl get pods -n mongodb -l app=mongodb-replica --no-headers 2>/dev/null | grep -c "Running" || true)
  TOTAL=$(kubectl get pods -n mongodb -l app=mongodb-replica --no-headers 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' ')
  echo "  Attempt $i: $READY/$TOTAL pods Running"
  if [ "$READY" -eq 3 ] && [ "$TOTAL" -eq 3 ]; then
    echo "All 3 pods are Running!"
    break
  fi
  sleep 5
done
kubectl get pods -n mongodb
input.description: Wait for all 3 MongoDB pods to be Running
